name: ExtensionArtifactAssessment_WorkflowStatus
title: R5: submitted | triaged | waiting-for-input | resolved-no-change | resolved-change-required | deferred | duplicate | applied | published | entered-in-error (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ArtifactAssessment.workflowStatus` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ArtifactAssessment.workflowStatus` 0..1 `code`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
* R5 `ArtifactAssessment.workflowStatus` 0..1 `code`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ArtifactAssessment.workflowStatus` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `ArtifactAssessment` is not mapped.
Element `ArtifactAssessment.workflowStatus` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: submitted | triaged | waiting-for-input | resolved-no-change | resolved-change-required | deferred | duplicate | applied | published | entered-in-error (new)
